full_text:
Bao Xun (Shuye) 鮑勛 (叔業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Xun (鮑勛), styledShuye (叔業), was born in Pingyang county, Taishan commandery. His strict morality greatly offended Cao Pi, who later executed him. Bao Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Bao Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
